docs.text:

You can search on the website in the top right corner and you can also search the page with: CTRL + F

docs.title: How to Become a Hero
docs.text:
1. Compete in monthly PvP events (Olympiad)
  2. Earn the most points in your class
  3. Ties go to the most active fighter

docs.title: Match Structure
docs.text:
• 45 sec preparation time
  • 3 min battle time
  • HP/MP/CP reset before start
  • All buffs, debuffs, and pets removed on arrival
  • Servitors stay but lose buffs

Win condition: Kill opponent OR deal more damage

Restrictions

  • Only main class allowed (no subclasses)
  • Requires 1+ Olympiad point to participate
  • Limited consumables permitted (spiritshots & soulshots)
  • No teleport/recall skills
  • Disconnection = automatic loss
  • Server crash = null match

docs.title: Olympiad Points System
docs.text:
• Start with 18 points per period
  • Gain +3 weekly
  • Winners steal points from losers

End of Period Exchange

If you have more than 50 points at period end:

Exchange Rate: 1 Olympiad Point = 1,000 Noblesse Gate Passes

(Minimum 50 points required to exchange)

C4 Patch Notes C5 Patch Notes Hero

docs.title: Noblesse – How to Unlock and What You Get
How To Get Noblesse
docs.text:
1. Reach level 75 on your subclass.
  2. Complete all Possessor of a Precious Soul quests. (Parts I–IV)
  3. Unlock: Once done, you become Noblesse on both main and subclass.

Noblesse Quests

Part IPart IIPart IIIPart IV

Start NPC: Talien (Aden, Temple)

Requirements:

  • Subclass Level 50
  • 1 Hellfire Oil, 5 Lunaragents

docs.title: What You Get With Noblesse
docs.text:
• Custom Titles

    Choose any title (no clan required)

    Use command: /nick title

  • Noblesse Tiara

    Special untradeable headgear

    Tiara Preview

  • Teleports

    Access secret spots (like dungeon interiors)

    C4 Map

    C5 Map

  • Battle Reports (Clan Leaders only)

    Track team kills, deaths, and positions during sieges.

    Refreshes every 30 seconds.

    Use command: /clanwarstatus

  • Monument of Heroes

    Displays your raid / siege history in every town

  • PvP Boost

    Deal extra damage in PvP fights

C4 Patch Notes

docs.title: General Info
docs.text:
Subclasses are a major milestone in your character's progression. If you finish the subclass quests, you're eligible to unlock a new class on the same character that starts from level 40, allowing you to switch classes.

Quick Start

Talk to the appropriate Class Master in your village to switch between your main class and any subclass you've unlocked.

docs.title: Quests
docs.text:
To unlock your subclass, complete the following quests:

  • Fate's Whisper
    • Hallate - Tower of Insolence - (3rd floor)
    • Kernon - Tower of Insolence - (8th floor)
    • Golkonda - Tower of Insolence - (11th floor)
  • Mimir's Elixir

docs.title: Subclass Mechanics
docs.text:
• Switching classes removes active buffs and symbol skills.

  • The following information is retained between main and subclass:

    • PvP/PK count
    • Clan and siege info
    • Recommendations and votes
    • Friends and party
    • Seven Signs progress
    • Quest progress
    • Inventory & Warehouse

Note

Weight penalties still apply, and you may become overloaded after switching classes.

docs.title: Subclass Limits
docs.text:
• Level up a subclass to 75 to unlock two more.
  • There’s no cooldown or limit on how often you can switch.
  • Subclasses are required to unlock:
    • Noblesse
    • Olympiad participation requires Noblesse

C3 Patch Notes

docs.title: What is Lineage][ ?
docs.text: The world of Lineage II is a war-torn land. You have been thrown into this chaos. You have the power to protect yourself, developing a character is not an end in itself. It is your instrument to obtain power to enforce your will in this world. Your own hand will write the history of this world.

docs.title: Classes
docs.text:
Players can choose from 5-7 races (depending on the updates):

  • Human (balanced, versatile)
  • Elf (agility-based)
  • Dark Elf (glass cannons)
  • Orc (high strength)
  • Dwarf (crafting/adena focused melee)

Origins, Essence, H5 Forever:

  • Races from above
  • Kamael (offensive magic / melee playstyle)

Essence

  • Races from above
  • Sylphs (agile, ranged gun fighter)
  • High Elf (elemental mage or tank)

Additionally, each race begins with 1-2 base classes (Fighter / Mystic) that can select from a pool of their limited classes on finishing class advancement quests.

Dwarf Fighter Class Tree

Supports are essential as they can give character enhancement "buffs" for a limited time (~20 minutes) therefore highly sentivize group play. The game's balancing system and stats for Monsters are adjusted having this in mind.

docs.title: Combat System
docs.text:
In Lineage II, what you see on the screen is in real time. Therefore, it is critical to make an appropriate decision quickly for every situation you get in. Lineage II pursues both strategic and action-oriented features.

You will battle monsters, players and fight for spots, use skills that need to be selected according to each particular situation, overcome situations through teamwork with other clan members, and experience action that is always thrilling, even when you kill a single monster.

In Lineage II, attacking other players triggers a color-coded PK system that tracks aggression and penalties.

docs.title: Castle Sieges
docs.text:
Most of the Lords that built castles in the Era of the Giants, still remained and now Kings use them as their castles; ancient technologies easily surpasses modern fortification technology.

Other clans who attempt to seize power also want to own a castle. Since the purpose of the many clans is to rule the territory according to their ideals, the capturing of the castle is their ultimate goal.

Siege warfare is an innovative PvP combat system. Lineage II's siege warfare has two major goals:

  • Bring out the best player strategies
  • Create evolving political drama and excitement.

Siege warfare can continuously create different strategies, even after several months or several years, and will leave you breathless and excited when you stand fully armed with your allies in front of the taken castle.

Numerous privileges are given to the clans who occupy the castle. They impose a tax on the shops around the castle, expand the facilities within the castle, manufacture various items, and offer the Castle Lord a Wyvern to conquer the sky. There are various systems in which the castle-owning clans operate and maintain many public facilities used by other players to make a profit.

docs.title: Name Colors & Their Meanings
docs.text: Color Meaning Consequences Normal (White) Neutral (non-aggressive) No penalties. Purple Player has attacked someone (aggressor) Can be attacked without penalty by others. Red Player has killed someone (PKer) High-risk status, can drop items

docs.title: 1. Initiating an Attack
docs.text:
• When you attack another player (unprovoked), your name turns purple.
  • The victim can retaliate without penalty (their name also turns purple if they fight back).
  • If the victim does not retaliate, killing them will turn you red.

docs.title: 2. Becoming a PKer (Red Name)
docs.text:
• Killing >5 players (varies by Server) turns your name red.
  • Red players suffer penalties:
    • Drop items on death (high chance to lose equipped gear).
    • Guards attack on sight in towns.

docs.title: 3. Removing Karma Status
docs.text:
• Die repeatedly: Each death reduces Karma points.
  • Kill monsters: By earning experience, you can reduce your Karma points

Info

If you reduce your Karma Points to 0, your name will turn white.

docs.title: 4. Reducing PK
docs.text: • Do the Repent Your Sins Quest: When you level up Sin Eater Pet and hand it to Black Judge, it will reduce your PK points, allowing you to kill again up to a certain point without drop penalty.

docs.title: 5. Key Mechanics
docs.text:
• Self-Defense Rule: If a purple player attacks you, killing them does not give PK points.
  • Party PKs: Only the player who lands the killing blow gets PK points.
  • Chaotic Zones: Some areas (e.g., Giran Arena) allow free PvP without penalties (e.g., -EXP).

Tip: Avoid unnecessary PKing unless you’re prepared for consequences!

docs.title: How to report Dual-Box / Bot?
docs.text:
Warning

Never warn suspects - it compromises investigations.

  1. Target the player, in ALT + C select "Auto Hunting Report" (If available)

  2. Contact Staff on Discord and include the suspects' nicknames and server name.

    • EU Daytime: Message @ginreborn or @astarothreborn
    • EU Late Night: Message @serielreborn (Times based on Germany time-zone)
    Hello! "Thomas and "Charles might be dualboxing on Main Eternal.

  3. If they don't respond, open a ticket

    • Include: Time & time zone, server, nicknames.
      • Upload images and videos with imgur.com + streamable.com and share the public link.

Auto Hunting Report is not a live report, it sends the report to database for checking it out later.

Mention nicknames and server name.

docs.title: Rules applicable on all L2Reborn Servers
docs.text:
Read Carefully

These rules apply to all L2Reborn servers.

Violations may lead to penalties including suspensions or bans.

docs.title: 1. Botting
docs.text:
The use of automation tools is strictly prohibited.

Only in-game macros (via the Macro system) are allowed.

docs.title: 2. Dualbox / AFK Farming
docs.text:
• Dualboxing and AFK farming are not allowed.
  • ONE person may control only ONE character at a time per server.
    • Using multiple devices to play multiple characters is also forbidden.
  • Multiple people on the same network are permitted as long as:
    • Each person controls only one character
    • Each person is able to solve captchas

docs.title: 3. Real Money Trading (RMT)
docs.text: Exchanging in-game items, services, characters, or accounts for real money is strictly prohibited.

docs.title: 4. Exploits
docs.text:
• Any bugs must be reported to staff.
  • Deliberate abuse of bugs for gain will lead to penalties.

docs.title: 5. Scamming
docs.text:
All forms of scamming are forbidden.

Includes, but NOT limited to:

  • Scamshops
    • Advertising one item but selling another (e.g., SOP/D gems).
    • Announcing low prices but charging much higher (e.g., AA for 13a but sold for 13kk).
    • Misleading package deals (e.g., sets with swapped items).
    • Craft shops with absurd material costs (e.g., 1kk per material).
  • Account theft
    • Stealing items by logging into another player’s account.

High-Value Item Clause

Severe cases of scamming involving high-value items (e.g., S-grade equipment, epic jewelry) may warrant compensation at the staff’s discretion.

docs.title: 6. Shops
docs.text:
• Refer to Rule 5 regarding scamshops.
  • Each person is allowed only ONE offline shop AND one per account:
    • Even if you have multiple accounts, you can only have 1 offline shop maximum per person.
      • Make sure that if you wish to play on a character, it's not on the same account as the offline shop.
    • If your client is active, you may also run one online shop.
  • Essence, Eternal, H5 Forever are allowed to have more than one offline shop, but still one per account.

docs.title: 7. Playing on Multiple Servers
docs.text:
You may play on more than one L2Reborn server. However:

  • All servers’ rules apply fully.
  • Don’t use one server as an excuse for neglecting another (e.g., failing captchas).

Optimize Your Time

Setting up a shop or organizing gear on one server while farming actively on another is the best way to multi-task.

docs.title: 1. Offline Farming
docs.text:
Offline farming is allowed via the in-game system.

You may not open a second client to farm actively with another character at the same time.

docs.title: 2. Mouse Macros
docs.text:
The use of mouse macro software is permitted despite the general prohibition in Rule 1.

Use of generic auto-clickers or random macro software is not permitted.

docs.title: 3. Griefing is Prohibited
docs.text:
Any actions considered "griefing" are not allowed.

See: Changelog Essence-66 for more details.

Resources

  • Server Rules

docs.title: Why do I have to worry about Account Security?
docs.text:
Reborn sets up systems and rules to protect players, but we're not responsible for players' actions in or out of the game.

Your account is your responsibility

Never share your password or l2reborn_easylogin.ini file, even with staff members.

l2reborn_easylogin.ini contains all of your passwords.

Scam Protection

  • Report all scams - Staff will ban the scammers.
  • 2FA + Lock required to:
    • See scammer details
    • Recover lost epic/high-value items

docs.title: Enable 2FA
docs.text:
Activate two-factor authentication on the L2Reborn website.

Link

docs.title: About 2FA
docs.text:
2FA generates a temporary code from your phone when logging into the website.

Essential for account security.

docs.title: Use the Lock System
docs.text:
Locked characters can't trade, sell, modify items or PK.

Commands:

  • .setlockpw pin - will set pin code to lock & unlock
  • .lock pin - enables protection
  • .unlock pin - disables protection

docs.title: Reset Lock System
docs.text:
Requirements

Enable 2FA first.

  • Visit Game Accounts
  • Click Overview on the account
  • Click ⋯ and Unlock

docs.title: Use Unique Passwords
docs.text: Use different passwords for different accounts (master, email, servers)

docs.title: Never Share Sensitive Information
docs.text: Keep your in-game goods and account details private.

docs.title: Summary
docs.text:
• You are the first line of defense.
  • No one, not friends or staff, needs your password.
  • Stay skeptical, if something feels off, it probably is.
Staff Impersonators Password Cracking Times

docs.title: Ultimate Fix Summary
docs.text:
Try all steps, what you've tested, and share your results in Discord if the issue continues

Please make sure that:

  • You are using Windows 10 or 11.
  • Your Windows copy is legitimate and not run in a virtual environment. No debug/insider version.
  • Reborn files (l2.exe) and folders are added as exceptions/exclusions in your antivirus and firewall settings.
  • ESET/BitDefender/Kaspersky/McAfee/Malwarebytes/Avast/AVG anti-viruses
    • Don't care about your settings, uninstall them to run L2.
  • If you’re using a touchpad, note that it may be blocked; please use a mouse instead.
  • If you get stuck at the proxy selection screen, go back into the login menu again and select another proxy.
  • Ensure you have the latest Visual C++ Redistributable for x86 installed.
  • Your drivers are up-to-date.
  • You are logging in with your in-game account's username (e.g. le_lenny13) and not your Master Account's email.

Additionally try:

  • Restarting your router
  • Restarting your computer
  • Disabling Riot's Vanguard, and other anti-cheats.
    • Here's how to play League with L2
  • Deleting your system folder and repairing your files.
  • Disabling all overlay extensions: Discord, Overwolf etc..

docs.title: Do Linux & MacOS operating systems work?
docs.text:
Does not work on Reborn servers – SmartGuard (anti-cheat) only supports Windows 10/11.

M1/M2 Macs (Apple Silicon) are NOT supported.

Only works on Intel-based Macs with a Windows partition (via Boot Camp).

docs.text: No, keyboard presses through streaming software don't work.

docs.text: No, SmartGuard (anti-cheat) prevents this.

  • If that does not work: restart your router and computer.

docs.text: If you can't see certain discord channels, assign yourself the Origins role.

docs.title: Missing Account on Website
docs.text:
Make sure that you are not on the correct Master Account.

  • If you are: Exit the Account and clear the cookies and refresh.

  2. Open Riot Launcher.
  3. Exit Vanguard
  4. Click Start on Riot Launcher.

docs.text:
Save l2reborn_easylogin.ini file to Desktop, it contains your passwords.

  • Put it back in System folder after the install is done and don't share that file. Ever.

Delete your System folder and do Repair.

docs.title: Client Red Error
docs.text: Close Updater, delete that file that has problem, re-launch Updater.

docs.title: 0301 CDEF0007
docs.text:
1. Method 1: Uninstall the Latest Update (for Minor Updates)

  2. Open Settings → Press Win + I

  3. Go to Update & Security → Windows Update

  4. Click View update history

  5. Select Uninstall updates

  6. Find the most recent update, select it, and click Uninstall

  7. Restart your computer

Credit: @mefox_ @abeisede

docs.title: 0301 CDEF0002
docs.text: Make sure you have Windows 10/11 and no 'Insider Mode' or other Beta/Debug features enabled.

• Download and Run: All in One VC Redistributables
  • Latest Windows 11 version might not be supported by SmartGuard, wait ~3 days for SmartGuard to catch up or revert the update.
  • You are not missing a file.

docs.title: Adventure Awaits
docs.text:
Reborn is one of the most popular private servers for several versions of Lineage 2 with no pay to win, no wipes and no dual-box.

It started in 2019 October 31 by a group of enthusiasts with the goal of providing a vanilla and plain experience to bring back childhood memories.

First time playing? Here's everything you need to get started:

docs.title: Install
docs.text:
1. Install the Launcher
  2. After launcher installs, press “Download” on which server you'd like to play on.
  3. Once finished downloading, press “Play”

If there's an issue during the Download, try restarting your Router, or use Mobile Data / VPN.

For any other issue, please refer to the Help & Support page.

docs.title: Account Registration
docs.text:
1. Create a Master Account
    • Your Master Account holds all of your in–game accounts.
  2. Create an In-Game Account
    • Choose "Manage Account" the server you would like to play on.
    • Press Create Account
    • Choose a random prefix from the list.
    • Your in-game username will look like: eg_example123

docs.title: Login
docs.text:
Warning

Make sure to login with your in-game account's username and not your email.

Do not share the l2reborn_easylogin.ini file with anyone, it contains your passwords.

You don’t have to do fill out your account details every time, use “Login Easy Manager” in the bottom right corner.

All the servers you see are essentially proxies that connect to the same game server, it's just for better connectivity, choose either a Proxy closest to you or the Main server.

  • The server is in France.

If you wish to play on the Seasonal Servers, choose from the [NEW] servers.

If nothing happens after you pressed “OK”, you might have taken too long or the proxy is down.

  • Try another proxy by going into the login menu again.

docs.title: You are all set!
docs.text:
It's time to create your character now, I hope you enjoy your your journey.

Check out my other guides for navigating around the world of Aden.

Good luck & have fun!
